DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF PRABHAKAR MARIAN ISAAC. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: 1) THAT PLAINTIFF SERVE VERIFIED, OBJECTION-FREE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; 2) THAT PLAINTIFF SERVE VERIFIED, OBJECTION-FREE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; 3) THAT PLAINTIFF SERVE VERIFIED, OBJECTION FREE RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, INCLUDING ANY AND ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS; 4) THAT PLAINTIFF SERVE A STATEMENT OF DAMAGES OF DAMAGES; 5) THAT ALL OUTSTANDING DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND VERIFICATIONS BE SERVED WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS COURT'S ORDER; AND 6) SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED TO DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $430. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT TOM@THOMASCOHEN.COM JUDGE PRO TEM: THOMAS COHEN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Off Calendar Mar-12-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Terminating Sanctions.

No appearances in this matter. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Transferred to be heard at 9 am in Department 301 on the same date. Department 301 handles all discovery matters.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

The Regents Of The University Of California'S Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions


Off Calendar Mar-12-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Gregory Lewis (gjl@hassard.com) of Hassard Bonnington LLP for Defendant.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

The Regents Of The University Of California'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions

DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S UNOPPOSED MOTION AGAINST PLAINTIFF PRABHAKAR MARION ISSAAC FOR TERMINATION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:
(1) PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE DEFENDANT WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER CODE COMPLIANT OBJECTION FREE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES,SET ON, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AS WELL AS A STATEMENT OF DAMAGES.
(2) IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS OF PARAGRAH ONE WITHIN TEN (10) DAY THE COURT ORDERS THAT DEFENDANT WILL BE ENTITLED TO THE IMPOSITON OF TERMINATION SANSCTION DISMISSING WITH PREJUDICE THE COMPLAINT.
(3) THE COURT WILL ASSESS MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINT PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $430.00, PAYABLE TO DEFENDANT AND ITS COUNSEL PAYMENT TO BE MADE WITHIN TEN (10) DATES FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Statement Of Damages; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Prabhakar Marian Isaac
Off Calendar Sep-14-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Gregory J. Lewis, Esq. gjl@hassard.com 415-288-9800 for Defendants.
No other Appearance.

THE PARTY STIPULATES TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Statement Of Damages; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Prabhakar Marian Isaac.

The Motion is granted as follows: 1) that plaintiff serve verified, objection-free responses to Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Set One; 2) that plaintiff serve verified, objection-free responses to Defendant's Special Interrogatories, Set One; 3) that plaintiff serve verified, objection free responses to Requests for Production of Documents, Set One, including any and all responsive documents; 4) that plaintiff serve a Statement of damages of Damages; 5) that all outstanding discovery responses and verifications be served within 10 days of notice of entry of this court's order; and 6) Sanctions are awarded to Defendant in the amount of $430.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at tom@thomascohen.com

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
